message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor

participant "ConditionalFormattingCellExtensionAction" as CFCEA
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellWindow" as CFCW
participant "Cell" as Cell
participant "ReationalOperator" as RO
participant "Language" as Lang
participant "UIController" as UIC
participant "ConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as CFCSBE

Actor -> CFCEA : starts use case
CFCEA -> CFCW : create()
CFCW -> RO : list=getBinaryOperators()
CFCW -> Lang : getIdentifier()
CFCW -> Actor : asks to choose a operator
Actor -> CFCW : select one
Actor -> CFCW : insert value
Actor -> CFCW : confirms
CFCW -> CFCSBE : activecell= getActiveCell()
CFCW -> Cell : content= getContent()
CFCW -> RO : checkCondition(value,content)
CFCW -> Cell : setBackgroundColor()
CFCW -> CFCSBE : refreshConditionSideBar()
CFCW -> UIC : refreshConditionInfo()

@enduml
